debug_info.goal:
a b c : ℝ
h₀ : 0 < a ∧ 0 < b ∧ 0 < c
h₁ : c < a + b
h₂ : b < a + c
h₃ : a < b + c
⊢ 0 ≤ a ^ 2 * b * (a - b) + b ^ 2 * c * (b - c) + c ^ 2 * a * (c - a)

proof:
rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
            sq_nonneg (a * (a - b)), sq_nonneg (b * (b - c)), sq_nonneg (c * (c - a)),
            mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc,
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₂), 
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₂) (sub_pos.mpr h₃), 
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₃)
           ]
failed_attempts:
have ha : 0 < a := h₀.1
  have hb : 0 < b := h₀.2.1
  have hc : 0 < c := h₀.2.2
  nlinarith [mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc,
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₂),
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₂) (sub_pos.mpr h₃),
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₃),
          mul_pos (show 0 < a * b by nlinarith) (show 0 < c by linarith),
          mul_pos (show 0 < b * c by nlinarith) (show 0 < a by linarith),
          mul_pos (show 0 < a * c by nlinarith) (show 0 < b by linarith)]
successful_attempts:
rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
            sq_nonneg (a * (a - b)), sq_nonneg (b * (b - c)), sq_nonneg (c * (c - a)),
            mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc,
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₂), 
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₂) (sub_pos.mpr h₃), 
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₃)
           ]

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a * b - b * c), sq_nonneg (b * c - c * a), sq_nonneg (c * a - a * b),
          sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
          mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc,
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₂), 
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₂) (sub_pos.mpr h₃), 
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₃)]

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
          sq_nonneg (a - b + c), sq_nonneg (a + b - c), sq_nonneg (a - b - c),
          mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc,
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₂), 
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₂) (sub_pos.mpr h₃), 
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₃)
]

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
          sq_nonneg (a - b + c), sq_nonneg (a + b - c), sq_nonneg (a - b - c),
          mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc,
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₂), 
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₂) (sub_pos.mpr h₃), 
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₃)
]

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a * b - b * c), sq_nonneg (b * c - c * a), sq_nonneg (c * a - a * b),
          sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
          mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc,
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₂), 
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₂) (sub_pos.mpr h₃), 
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₃)
]

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
            sq_nonneg (a - b + c), sq_nonneg (a + b - c), sq_nonneg (a - b + c),
            mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc,
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₂),
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₂) (sub_pos.mpr h₃),
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₃)]

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
          sq_nonneg (a - b + c), sq_nonneg (b - c + a), sq_nonneg (c - a + b),
          mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc,
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₂), 
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₂) (sub_pos.mpr h₃), 
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₃)]

have h4 : 0 < a := h₀.1
  have h5 : 0 < b := h₀.2.1
  have h6 : 0 < c := h₀.2.2
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
          sq_nonneg (a - b + c), sq_nonneg (a + b - c), sq_nonneg (a - b - c),
          mul_pos h4 h5, mul_pos h5 h6, mul_pos h4 h6,
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₂),
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₂) (sub_pos.mpr h₃),
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₃)]

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a * b - b * c), sq_nonneg (b * c - c * a), sq_nonneg (c * a - a * b),
          sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
          mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc,
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₂), 
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₂) (sub_pos.mpr h₃), 
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₃)]

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  have h4 : 0 < a + b - c := by linarith
  have h5 : 0 < a + c - b := by linarith
  have h6 : 0 < b + c - a := by linarith
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
          sq_nonneg (a + b - c), sq_nonneg (a + c - b), sq_nonneg (b + c - a),
          mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc,
          mul_pos (show 0 < a + b - c by linarith) (show 0 < a + c - b by linarith),
          mul_pos (show 0 < a + c - b by linarith) (show 0 < b + c - a by linarith),
          mul_pos (show 0 < a + b - c by linarith) (show 0 < b + c - a by linarith)
        ]

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
            sq_nonneg (a + b - c), sq_nonneg (a + c - b), sq_nonneg (b + c - a),
            mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc,
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₂), 
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₂) (sub_pos.mpr h₃), 
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₃)]

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a * b - b * c), sq_nonneg (b * c - c * a), sq_nonneg (c * a - a * b),
            sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
            mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc,
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₂),
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₂) (sub_pos.mpr h₃),
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₃)]

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  have h4 : 0 < a * b := mul_pos ha hb
  have h5 : 0 < b * c := mul_pos hb hc
  have h6 : 0 < c * a := mul_pos hc ha
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
            sq_nonneg (a * (a - b)), sq_nonneg (b * (b - c)), sq_nonneg (c * (c - a)),
            mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc,
            mul_pos (show 0 < a + b - c by linarith) (show 0 < a + c - b by linarith),
            mul_pos (show 0 < a + c - b by linarith) (show 0 < b + c - a by linarith),
            mul_pos (show 0 < a + b - c by linarith) (show 0 < b + c - a by linarith)]

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  have h4 : 0 < a + b - c := by linarith
  have h5 : 0 < a + c - b := by linarith
  have h6 : 0 < b + c - a := by linarith
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
            sq_nonneg (a + b - c), sq_nonneg (a + c - b), sq_nonneg (b + c - a),
            mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc,
            mul_pos h4 h5, mul_pos h5 h6, mul_pos h4 h6]

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
          sq_nonneg (a - b + c), sq_nonneg (a + b - c), sq_nonneg (a - b - c),
          mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc,
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₂), 
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₂) (sub_pos.mpr h₃), 
          mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₃)]

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
            sq_nonneg (a + b - c), sq_nonneg (a + c - b), sq_nonneg (b + c - a),
            mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc,
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₂),
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₂) (sub_pos.mpr h₃),
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₃)]

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
            sq_nonneg (a + b - c), sq_nonneg (a + c - b), sq_nonneg (b + c - a),
            mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos ha hc, mul_pos hb hc,
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₂),
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₂) (sub_pos.mpr h₃),
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₃)]

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  have h4 : 0 < a + b - c := by linarith
  have h5 : 0 < a + c - b := by linarith
  have h6 : 0 < b + c - a := by linarith
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
            sq_nonneg (a + b - c), sq_nonneg (a + c - b), sq_nonneg (b + c - a),
            mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc,
            mul_pos h4 h5, mul_pos h5 h6, mul_pos h4 h6]

rcases h₀ with ⟨ha, hb, hc⟩
  nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a * b - b * c), sq_nonneg (b * c - c * a), sq_nonneg (c * a - a * b),
            sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - a),
            mul_pos ha hb, mul_pos hb hc, mul_pos ha hc,
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₂),
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₂) (sub_pos.mpr h₃),
            mul_pos (sub_pos.mpr h₁) (sub_pos.mpr h₃)]
